<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Delete a device"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"delete"}
  path={"/api/v1/domains/{domain_uuid}/devices/{device_uuid}"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Deletes a device within the specified domain.

<Heading
  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
  children={"Request"}
>
</Heading>

<ParamsDetails
  parameters={[{"in":"path","name":"domain_uuid","description":"The domain UUID.","example":"4018f7a3-8e0a-47bb-9f4f-04b1313e0e1b","required":true,"schema":{"type":"string"}},{"in":"path","name":"device_uuid","description":"The device UUID.","example":"c0ec8113-aa15-40ac-8437-47185dd9dcf4","required":true,"schema":{"type":"string"}}]}
>
  
</ParamsDetails>

  title={"Body"}
  body={undefined}
